violations.text: Employees were observed eating in the kitchen space. an employee shall eat, drink, or use any form of tobacco products only in designated areas where the contamination of exposed food; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and linens; unwrapped single-service and single-use articles; or other items needing protection cannot result. PIC informed that employees shall eat in designated areas only. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice machine was taken out of service during the time of inspection and ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to clean, sanitize, and allow unit to air dry prior to returning the unit to service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Alfredo sauce and sauteed leeks were placed hot in the prep unit refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. Food items were placed into alternate containers and placed into the walk-in cooler to finish the cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Cooked lobster meat was observed thawing in its original intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP) in the walk-in cooler. Seafood items packaged in ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen to the food item. Food items were observed held at 33 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from their original packaging during the time of inspection. ROP thawing guidance provided and reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on cookline prep unit #2, the salad prep unit, as well as the seafood 2-door low boy. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to mark which food items are served undercooked or raw. Establishment marked food items on menu during time of inspection until reprinted menus are available. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses in the kitchen on the cookline and at the salad/ raw bar station. Utensils were removed from containers of water and sanitized during time of inspection. Utensils are to be stored in one of the following manners; on a dry clean surface, in water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to flush potential contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The doors located on the 2-door low boy in the salad and raw bar area was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of both the ice machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
